posts.author: rashas (rasha)
posts.cookedHtml:
we are moving to a new board in new workspace , I need to export this board with the documents in the files column, when I export them they are exported as links , and when I imported them, the links change “I think always link is the start of board id”
How can I export and import documents as document?

posts.author: rehan.abdul (Rehan AQ | monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: We have done that using make.com . To my knowledge, you cannot do it like the way you mentioned above in monday.
